result.stdout:
USAGE:
    upk <folder-path> [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    upk pack ./ProjectWingman
    upk pack C:\Mods\GoldNozzlesForLife\Nimbus
    upk unpack ./ClearlyInferiorMobiusSkins.pak
    upk unpack C:\SuperSecretFiles\Cursed\FD14_Tacmot.pak

ARGUMENTS:
    <folder-path>     

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

COMMANDS:
    pack <fileRoot>     
    unpack              
    list

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    upk list [fileName] [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    [fileName]    Path to the target PAK file to unpack

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                        Prints help information                   
    -o, --output <MODE>               Specify the output format for parsed data 
        --version [ARCHIVEVERSION]    Archive version of the target file.       
                                      Defaults to '3'                           
        --magic [FILEMAGIC]           Overrides the default file magic

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    upk pack <fileRoot> [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    <fileRoot>    Directory containing your mod files (aka Nimbus folder)

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                         Prints help information        
        --output-name <OUTPUT-NAME>    The target pak file to generate
        --version <ARCHIVEVERSION>                                    
        --mount-point <MOUNT-POINT>                                   
        --no-auto                                                     
    -z, --compress

commands.payload:
USAGE:
    upk pack <fileRoot> [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    <fileRoot>    Directory containing your mod files (aka Nimbus folder)

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                         Prints help information        
        --output-name <OUTPUT-NAME>    The target pak file to generate
        --version <ARCHIVEVERSION>                                    
        --mount-point <MOUNT-POINT>                                   
        --no-auto                                                     
    -z, --compress

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    upk unpack [fileName] [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    [fileName]    Path to the target PAK file to unpack

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                        Prints help information                   
        --output [OUTPUTPATH]         Target path to unpack the files to        
        --version [ARCHIVEVERSION]    Archive version of the target file.       
                                      Defaults to '3'                           
        --magic [FILEMAGIC]           Overrides the default file magic
